nasb.text: Then behold, the man clothed in linen at whose loins was the writing case reported, saying, “I have done just as You have commanded me.”

esv.text: And behold, the man clothed in linen, with the writing case at his waist, brought back word, saying, “I have done as you commanded me.”

cnv.text: 那身穿細麻布衣服，腰間帶著墨盒子的人回報這事，說：“我已經照著你所吩咐我的行了。”

ccb.text: 那个身穿细麻衣，腰带墨盒的人回来禀告说：“我已照你的吩咐做了。”
